mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_points WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_points WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_points WHERE create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
